body:
This PR adds interpolation routines to OutputVar. With this PR, one can evaluate an `OutputVar` as if it were a mathematical function (`var(t, x, y, z)`) and the result is computed with multilinear interpolation.

I also added a method to interpolate onto pressure levels. At this moment, the target pressure levels are chosen by linearly sampling the interval from min to max.

When values are outside of the range, linear extrapolation is performed.

Closes #23
title: Add interpolation and interpolation to pressure levels
